business.yearsInBusiness: Appraising since 2014; collecting art and antiques for over 20 years

content.about: WorthWise Appraisers is led by Candace Hill, an ISA Certified Member located in the greater Boulder/Denver metropolitan area who also serves the Aspen region. Since 2014, she has appraised over 8,000 items across a wide variety of categories including fine art, American Indian art, Asian art, and antiques. She has appraised works by artists including Banksy, Chagall, Dali, Picasso, Warhol, and Wayne Thiebaud. Candace has appeared on national television as a guest appraiser on the hit show Pawn Stars.
content.notes: ISA Certified Member since 2019; appeared on Pawn Stars; appraised 8,000+ items; serves greater Denver/Boulder and Aspen areas

address.street: Aspen, CO (also Denver office at 225 Union Blvd #150)

business.pricing: Commission-based for estate sales; contact for appraisal pricing

certifications: ISA CAPP (Certified Appraiser of Personal Property)

content.about: Prestige Estate Services was founded in 2010 by Alicia Weaver, an ISA CAPP-certified appraiser and University of Colorado at Boulder alumna. She is one of only approximately 108 appraisers in North America holding the CAPP designation. The firm has a dedicated Aspen/Vail office and specializes in providing detailed appraisals for personal property, fine art, and antiques. Alicia's clientele encompasses distinguished politicians, professional athletes, and celebrities. The firm also offers estate sale and liquidation services.
content.notes: Aspen/Vail office location; national firm with 30+ years of executive team experience; ISA CAPP certified; also offers estate sales
